understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the level by controlling selectable pieces to reach the goal tile(s) (marked as +), using a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction on the pixel-coordinate grid. If a pushable object (block) is directly adjacent in the movement direction, it can be pushed so both the piece and block shift together, provided space allows. Walls/boundaries (#) can prevent movement, though the blocked-direction indicator is only a hint and an attempted move may still succeed or fail depending on the specific boundary behavior. When multiple selectable pieces exist, CLICK on an on-screen selectable's exact pixel position switches control to that piece.
